title: TooEasy: PlayerRPGUpdate
description: Minecraft is too easy huh? Ramp up the difficulty with a RPG system and leveled-up mobs!
body:
!NEW UPDATE! TooEasy: 2.0.0
* Mobs get a buff
* Players can click on F7 to open a RPG Panel
  - You buy from the system attribute boosters
    + Heath
    + Attack Damage
    + Armor Boost
    + Speed
  
When you die you lose your system progress in this way you have a reason not to die if you do you lose your system attribute Booster what are meant to power you.
  
!!IF YOU HAVE IDEAS FOR THE RPG MOD I OPEN FOR SUGGESTIONS!!
!! END UPDATE Features !!
___________________________________________________________________________________________
We all know minecraft is an easy game. Lets spice things up! Here is a  mod (Early development) that has 1 goal, to turn minecraft into a RPG-type game. This version adds an entity level-up system and we will slowly add more mobs and weapons!
 
I am open to add your ideas! Let me know in the comments what would need to be added to this Mod!

Max Level
- Easy Mode : 50
- Normal Mode : 100
- Hard Mode : 150
 
Tiers
- Common Tier (until Level 30) : 1.5x Drop Multiplayer (ExpIncluded)
- UnCommon Tier (until Level 60) : 2.5x Drop Multiplayer (ExpIncluded)
- Rare Tier (until Level 90) : 4.0x Drop Multiplayer (ExpIncluded)
- Epic Tier (until Level 120) : 6.5x Drop Multiplayer (ExpIncluded)
- Chaos Tier (until Level 150) : 9x Drop Multiplayer (ExpIncluded)
 

IronGolem And Wolf Can also have levels To protect the GameBalance
